message:
test: interaction state machine tests — modal stack, focus transitions, cycling idempotency (2dccg.11.2)

7 new tests covering event routing and state machine behavior:
- palette_visible_survives_selection_moved: palette stays visible during
  concurrent selection events
- modal_dismiss_order: help then palette closes in LIFO order
- theme_change_during_palette: palette visible + selection preserved
- focus_region_transitions_are_deterministic: toggle cycle is repeatable
- rapid_density_cycling: 3/6 cycles return to initial state
- search_mode_cycling: full cycle returns to initial mode
- filter_clear_all: resets agents + time preset to defaults

Uses TestLogger for structured pass/fail diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
